from source import quicksort

def test_quicksort_preserves_duplicates_and_sorting():
    """quicksort should keep all elements (including duplicates) and return a sorted list."""
    input_arr = [3, 1, 3, 2]
    expected = [1, 2, 3, 3]
    result = quicksort(input_arr)
    assert result == expected, f"Expected {expected}, got {result}"
